ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the Enzyme automatic differentiator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaHealth/KomaMRI.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaHealth/KomaMRI.jl
Language: julia
Koma is a GPU-accelerated, Pulseq-compatible framework for simulating Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) acquisitions. The primary focus of this package is to simulate the wide range of scenarios encountered during pulse sequence development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaHomotopyContinuation/HomotopyContinuation.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaHomotopyContinuation/HomotopyContinuation.jl
Language: julia
A Julia package for solving systems of polynomials via homotopy continuation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaLang/julia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia
Language: julia
The Julia Programming Language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaRegistries/General
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General
Language: julia
The official registry of general Julia packages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaSmoothOptimizers/LinearOperators.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaSmoothOptimizers/LinearOperators.jl
Language: julia
Linear Operators for Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaStats/MixedModels.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaStats/MixedModels.jl
Language: julia
A Julia package for fitting (statistical) mixed-effects models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaStats/TimeSeries.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaStats/TimeSeries.jl
Language: julia
Time series toolkit for Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaSymbolics/Symbolics.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaSymbolics/Symbolics.jl
Language: julia
Symbolic programming for the next generation of numerical software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MadNLP/MadNLP.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MadNLP/MadNLP.jl
Language: julia
A solver for nonlinear programming with GPU support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MakieOrg/Makie.jl
Language: julia
Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/AbstractAlgebra.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/AbstractAlgebra.jl
Language: julia
Generic abstract algebra functionality in pure Julia (no C dependencies)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/Nemo.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/Nemo.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the FLINT number theory C library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumSavory/QuantumClifford.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumSavory/QuantumClifford.jl
Language: julia
Clifford circuits, graph states, and other quantum Stabilizer formalism tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumSavory/QuantumSavory.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumSavory/QuantumSavory.jl
Language: julia
A full stack simulator of quantum hardware, from the low-level analog physics to high-level network dynamics. Includes discrete event simulator, symbolic representation for quantum object, and works with many backend simulators.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumSavory/QuantumSymbolics.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumSavory/QuantumSymbolics.jl
Language: julia
Computer algebra tools for symbolic manipulations in quantum mechanics and quantum information

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
Language: julia
High performance ordinary differential equation (ODE) and differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers, including neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) and scientific machine learning (SciML)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/SciMLBase.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/SciMLBase.jl
Language: julia
The Base interface of the SciML ecosystem

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
Language: julia
Play atmospheric modelling like it's LEGO.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astroautomata/SymbolicRegression.jl
Language: julia
Distributed High-Performance Symbolic Regression in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gridap/Gridap.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gridap/Gridap.jl
Language: julia
Grid-based approximation of partial differential equations in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: julia
